briefdescription.para: Decoration actors which need clipping.
If true, emits TextChangedSignal in next OnRelayout().
If true, emits CursorPositionChangedSignal at the end of OnRelayout().
If true, emits SelectionStartedSignal at the end of OnRelayout().
If true, emits SelectionChangedSignal at the end of OnRelayout().
If true, emits SelectionClearedSignal at the end of OnRelayout().
args for cursor position changed event
args for selection changed event
args for selection changed event
Creates a new InputField.
Called when a property of an object of this type is set.

parameterdescription.para: The object whose property is set.

briefdescription.para: Called to retrieve a property of an object of this type.

parameterdescription.para: The object whose property is to be retrieved.

simplesect.para: The current value of the property.

detaileddescription.para: A reference counted object may only be deleted by calling Unreference()

briefdescription.para: InputFieldImpl constructor.
Called during measure pass. Override to implement custom measurement.
Called during arrange pass. Override to implement custom arrangement.
Sets the text.

parameterdescription.para: The text to display in UTF-8 format.

briefdescription.para: Gets the text.

simplesect.para: The text currently set on the inputField in UTF-8 format.

briefdescription.para: Sets the font family of the text.

parameterdescription.para: The requested font family to use.

briefdescription.para: Gets the font family of the text.

simplesect.para: The font family currently set on the inputField.

briefdescription.para: Sets the font size of the text.
Gets the font size of the text.

simplesect.para: The font size currently set on the inputField, in pixels.

briefdescription.para: Sets the color of the text.
Gets the color of the text.

simplesect.para: The text color currently set on the inputField.

briefdescription.para: Sets the horizontal alignment of the text within the inputField.
Gets the horizontal text alignment.
Sets the vertical alignment of the text within the inputField.
Gets the vertical text alignment.
Sets the overflow mode.
Gets the overflow mode.
Sets the placeholder text displayed when the input field is empty.

parameterdescription.para: The placeholder text in UTF-8 encoding.

briefdescription.para: Gets the placeholder text.

simplesect.para: The placeholder text in UTF-8 encoding.

briefdescription.para: Sets the color of the placeholder text.

parameterdescription.para: The placeholder text color as a UiColor.

briefdescription.para: Gets the color of the placeholder text.

simplesect.para: The placeholder text color as a UiColor.

briefdescription.para: Sets whether the placeholder text is shown when the input field has focus.

parameterdescription.para: True to show the placeholder text when focused, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Returns whether the placeholder text is shown when the input field has focus.

simplesect.para: True if the placeholder text is shown when focused, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Sets the width of the text cursor.
Gets the width of the text cursor.
Sets the color of the text cursor.

detaileddescription.para: This color is applied to both primary and secondary cursors when a split cursor is shown in bidirectional text.

parameterdescription.para: The cursor color as a UiColor.

briefdescription.para: Gets the color of the text cursor.

simplesect.para: The cursor color as a UiColor.

briefdescription.para: Sets whether the cursor should blink.

parameterdescription.para: True to enable cursor blinking, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Returns whether the cursor is set to blink.

simplesect.para: True if cursor blinking is enabled, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Sets the time interval in seconds between cursor on and off states.

parameterdescription.para: The cursor blink interval in seconds.

briefdescription.para: Returns the time interval in seconds between cursor on and off states.

simplesect.para: The cursor blink interval in seconds.

briefdescription.para: Sets the cursor position.

detaileddescription.para: The position is specified as a character index in the current text.

briefdescription.para: Returns the current cursor position.

detaileddescription.para: The returned value is the character index in the current text.

briefdescription.para: Sets the highlight color of the selected text region.

parameterdescription.para: The selection highlight color as a UiColor).

briefdescription.para: Gets the highlight color of the selected text region.

simplesect.para: The selection highlight color as a UiColor.

briefdescription.para: Sets the maximum number of characters that can be entered into the InputField.

parameterdescription.para: The maximum number of characters allowed.

briefdescription.para: Gets the maximum number of characters allowed in the InputField.
Sets how the layout direction of the text is resolved.

detaileddescription.para: - LayoutDirectionMode::CONTENTS: The layout direction is determined from the text content itself.

listitem.para: LayoutDirectionMode::INHERIT: The layout direction is inherited from the parent view.
LayoutDirectionMode::LOCALE: The layout direction is determined based on the system locale.

simplesect.para: The default layout direction mode of InputField is LayoutDirectionMode::INHERIT.

parameterdescription.para: The LayoutDirectionMode used to determine the text layout direction.

briefdescription.para: Gets the current layout direction mode.

simplesect.para: The LayoutDirectionMode used to resolve the text layout direction.

briefdescription.para: Sets the font weight.
Returns the font weight.
Sets the font width.
Returns the font width.
Sets the font slant.
Returns the font slant.
Sets the background color behind the text.

detaileddescription.para: The background is rendered behind the glyphs of the text.

briefdescription.para: Gets the background color behind the text.
Clears the text background color.

detaileddescription.para: Disables the text background and removes the previously set color.

briefdescription.para: Sets the underline style.
Clears the underline style.
Sets the shadow style.
Clears the shadow style.
Sets the outline style.
Clears the outline style.
Sets the line-through style.
Clears the line-through style.
Sets the font size scale.

detaileddescription.para: The scaled font size is calculated from the current font size multiplied by this scale value.

briefdescription.para: Gets the font size scale.
Sets the minimum font size scale.

detaileddescription.para: If this value is greater than the maximum font size scale, the adjusted font size scale follows this minimum value.

briefdescription.para: Gets the minimum font size scale.
Sets the maximum font size scale.

detaileddescription.para: If this value is less than the minimum font size scale, the adjusted font size scale follows the minimum font size scale.

briefdescription.para: Gets the maximum font size scale.
Sets whether the system font size scale is applied.

detaileddescription.para: When enabled, the system font size scale is used instead of the user-defined font size scale before applying the minimum and maximum constraints.

parameterdescription.para: True to apply the system font size scale, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Gets whether the system font size scale is applied.

simplesect.para: True if the system font size scale is applied, otherwise false.

briefdescription.para: Returns the font variation axes.
Clears the font variation.

detaileddescription.para: This removes all previously set font variation axes.

briefdescription.para: Gets the adjusted font size scale used for rendering.

detaileddescription.para: The adjusted font size scale is resolved after applying the current minimum and maximum font size scale constraints and, if enabled, the system font size scale.
If the minimum font size scale is greater than the maximum font size scale, the minimum font size scale takes precedence and is used as the adjusted scale.

simplesect.para: The adjusted font size scale used for rendering.

briefdescription.para: Sets the additional spacing between letters in pixels.

detaileddescription.para: Positive values increase the spacing, while negative values reduce it.

parameterdescription.para: The additional letter spacing in pixels.

briefdescription.para: Gets the additional spacing between letters in pixels.

simplesect.para: The additional letter spacing in pixels.

briefdescription.para: This signal is emitted when the text content changes.
This signal is emitted when the text input reaches the maximum allowed length.

detaileddescription.para: The signal is triggered when an attempt is made to insert additional characters beyond the configured maximum length.

briefdescription.para: This signal is emitted when the cursor position changes.

parameterdescription.para: The view whose cursor position changed.

briefdescription.para: Applies default values from UiConfigManager if initialized.
Called after the actor has been initialized.

memberdef.argsstring: (unsigned int position, unsigned int length, const std::string &content) override
memberdef.name: TextInserted

memberdef.argsstring: (unsigned int position, unsigned int length, const std::string &content) override
memberdef.name: TextDeleted

memberdef.argsstring: (unsigned int oldPosition, unsigned int newPosition) override
memberdef.name: CursorPositionChanged

memberdef.argsstring: (uint32_t oldStart, uint32_t oldEnd, uint32_t newStart, uint32_t newEnd) override
memberdef.name: SelectionChanged

memberdef.argsstring: (const uint32_t start, const uint32_t end) override
memberdef.name: SelectText

briefdescription.para: Called when the view's focus state changes. Override to add custom focus handling. Call the base class at the end of the override to preserve default state management.

parameterdescription.para: True if the view gained focus, false if lost

briefdescription.para: Called when a key event is received.

simplesect.para: True if the event is consumed

briefdescription.para: Handles focus gain (IME activation, controller notification).
Handles focus loss (IME deactivation, controller notification).
Connection needed to re-render text, when a Input Field returns to the scene.
Callback when a tap gesture is detected.
Callback when a pan gesture is detected.
Callback when a long press gesture is detected.
Callback when InputField is touched.
Callback function for when the layout is changed.

parameterdescription.para: The actor whose layoutDirection is changed.

briefdescription.para: Callback function for when the locale is changed.
Callback when keyboard is shown/hidden.
Enable or disable clipping.
Resize actor to the given size.
Add a layer for active or cursor.

parameterdescription.para: The actor in which to store the layer.

briefdescription.para: Render view, create and attach actor(s) to this Input Field.
Emits TextChanged signal.
Emits CursorPositionChanged signal.
This is the internal implementation class for InputField.
